{{Quote|The commander's glider, it's called, though on a diplomatic ship like this it would probably be assigned to Formbi instead of Captain Talshib.|[[Chak Fel]]|<ref name="Survivor's Quest">''[[Survivor's Quest]]''</ref>}}
The '''commander's glider''', sometimes known simply as the '''glider''', was a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]-equipped [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]].

==History==
These shuttles were carried aboard [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], for the personal use of the senior officer aboard. It was the only long-range shuttle assigned as standard to [[Starship/Legends|starships]] of the class represented by ''[[Chaf Envoy]]''.

Because ''Chaf Envoy'' was a diplomatic ship, her glider was assigned to [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano|Formbi]] rather than [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Brast'alshi'barku|Talshib]], and was used by the Aristocra to pick up [[Dean Jinzler]] from a rendezvous with [[Jorj Car'das]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
